JavaScript parsing, bytecode generation, and RegExp management components for JerryScript.

## Folders
- **[js](js/README.md)**: JavaScript parsing and bytecode generation components for the JerryScript engine, including lexer, parser, memory management, and utility functions.
- **[regexp](regexp/README.md)**: Functions and data structures for managing, compiling, and parsing RegExp bytecode in JerryScript.
